title: Monthly Empire State Manufacturing Survey Release Schedule

source.name: Federal Reserve Bank of New York

summary: This is a release schedule from the NY Fed dated July 14, 2003, announcing the monthly publication timing for the Empire State Manufacturing Survey. The public report releases at 8:30 AM on the 15th of each month (or first business day after if weekend/holiday); registered press with embargoed access receives it at 8:00 AM.
key_points: Announces the release schedule for the Monthly Empire State Manufacturing Survey conducted by the NY Fed
Public release time: 8:30 AM on the 15th of each month
If the 15th falls on a weekend or holiday, report posts on the first business day after
Registered press with embargoed website access receives it at 8:00 AM
why_it_matters: This is merely a release schedule announcement for the Empire State Manufacturing Survey, not actual survey data. It provides no economic insights, no market-moving information, and no policy content. Its only archival value would be historical context about NY Fed communications practices.
